occupation: Partner / Board Member / SVP at Media Resources Inc.
summary: Experienced Entrepreneur. Loves starting and building business. Part owner /Partner and Managing Director with a demonstrated history of working in the marketing and out of home advertising industry. Skilled in Digital Printing and LED manufacturing and Sales, Direct Marketing, Business Development, Marketing Strategy, and Graphics. Strong business development professional.

experiences.title: Partner / Board Member / SVP
experiences.description: Media Resources is Canada's largest national sign installation and maintenance companies. We manufacture large format Digital Printing and LED signs for outdoor advertising and point of purchase displays. We specialize in producing  Billboards, Real Estate signage and large format 3D displays. Offices are in Oakville, Edmonton, Calgary, Vancouver, New York and Miami.

experiences.title: Senior Vice President
experiences.description: Co-Founder of Cieslok Media Inc. Started leasing wall space for advertising down town Toronto in 2000. Key focus of the business was to secure advertising space and rent it to advertisers on a 4 week basis. Built 35 Locations and a few Spectacular Displays in the City. Sold in 2005 to Titan Outdoor. Cielsok Media went on to become a major force in the Out Of Home Advertising business in Canada. Eventually being sold to Astral Media in 2017

experiences.title: President / Owner
experiences.description: Started Company in 1993, became one of the largest and fastest growing digital printing business in North America. Sold Company in 1999 to Prismaflex International. Left in 2001 to start an Outdoor Media Company with a friend called Cieslok Media Inc. This company was sold to Titan Outdoor in 2005.

experiences.title: President
experiences.description: GHQ Imaging was one of the first Digital Printers in North America. Started with one printer and 3 partners in 1993 and ended up with 13 printers and 150 people running 24 hrs per day 7 days a week, we were supplying graphics all over the world. Sold to Prismaflex International in 1999
experiences.location: Toronto, New York, Detroit, Chicago, Miami
